title: picea brachytyla subsp. ascendens
intro: Picea brachytyla subsp. ascendens, also known as the Korean spruce or Manchurian spruce, is a subspecies of the Picea brachytyla tree species, native to China, Korea, and parts of Russia. The needles of this tree have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Picea brachytyla subsp. ascendens include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and improving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Picea brachytyla subsp. ascendens is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
